description: India Book III, 55: Letter from Perahya Yiju to his brother Shemuel. Written probably in al-Mahalla around the seventies or eighties of the twelfth century. Perhaya copies questions on religious law and asks his brother to obtain authoritative answers for them in Fustat.
description_he: ספר הודו III,55: מכתב מפרחיה יג'ו לאחיו שמואל, על שאלות בהלכה, כ-אל-מחלה, שנות ה-70-80 של המאה ה-12
